mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, category, profile_key, profile_value, source_message, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{po.userId}, #{po.category}, #{po.profileKey}, #{po.profileValue}, #{po.sourceMessage}, #{po.createdAt}, #{po.updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE profile_value = VALUES(profile_value), source_message = VALUES(source_message), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
